# .github - Republic Studio\n\n**Republic Studio lives in GitHub. This folder contains the strategic and operational guides for Republic development.**\n\n---\n\n## Core Documents\n\n### 🎯 [REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md)\n**Start here.** Complete overview of how Republic is developed.\n\nCovers:\n- Production Waves strategy\n- GitHub structure (issues, boards, milestones, labels)\n- How to use Republic Studio\n- Daily developer workflow\n- Wave progression\n- Success metrics\n\n**Read this first. Share with new team members.**\n\n---\n\n### 📋 [PRODUCTION_WAVES.md](./PRODUCTION_WAVES.md)\n**The development strategy.** Defines how Republic is built in 7 Production Waves.\n\nCovers:\n- Wave 0: Foundation (invisible infrastructure)\n- Wave 1: Simulation Core (the world alive)\n- Wave 2: Decision Interface (player office)\n- Wave 3: Emergence & Depth (consequences)\n- Wave 4: Intelligence & Autonomy (AI)\n- Wave 5: Multiplayer & Emergence (players together)\n- Wave 6: Presentation & Polish (beauty)\n\nEach Wave includes:\n- Objective\n- Systems to build\n- Duration\n- Milestone gate\n\n**Reference this when deciding what to build and when.**\n\n---\n\n### 🛠️ [REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md)\n**How to set up GitHub as Republic Studio.** Step-by-step operational guide.\n\nCovers:\n- Creating Wave project boards\n- Setting up milestones\n- Creating labels\n- Linking issues to Waves\n- Issue templates\n- Daily workflow\n- Weekly sprint planning\n- Automation setup\n- Reporting and metrics\n\n**Use this to configure GitHub initially and to onboard new team members.**\n\n---\n\n## Documentation Hierarchy\n\n```\n.github/\n├─ REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md          ← Start here (overview)\n├─ PRODUCTION_WAVES.md         ← Read this (strategy)\n├─ REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md    ← Follow this (implementation)\n└─ README.md                   ← This file\n\nDocs/\n├─ Gameplay Philosophy/        ← Why we're building this\n│  ├─ MANIFESTO.md            ← The north star\n│  ├─ Design Principles.md    ← 16 core principles + Republic Test\n│  └─ README.md               ← Navigation\n├─ Features/                   ← What to build in each Wave\n├─ Roadmap/                    ← Timeline by Wave\n├─ Architecture/               ← How to build it\n├─ UX/                         ← Player experience\n└─ README.md                   ← Documentation hub\n```\n\n---\n\n## Quick Links for Different Roles\n\n### 👨‍💼 Project Manager\n1. Read [REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md) for overview\n2. Check [Roadmap](../Docs/Roadmap/README.md) for Wave timeline\n3. Review project boards for current progress\n4. Track milestones for Wave completion gates\n5. Report velocity and burndown\n\n### 👨‍💻 Developer\n1. Read [REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md) for workflow\n2. Check current Wave in [Roadmap](../Docs/Roadmap/README.md)\n3. Open current Wave project board\n4. Pick an issue from \"Not Started\"\n5. Move to \"In Progress\" and build\n6. Create PR, move to \"In Review\"\n7. Merge, move to \"Done\"\n8. Repeat\n\n### 🎨 Designer\n1. Read [REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md) for strategy\n2. Review [Design Principles](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/Design%20Principles.md)\n3. Check [Features](../Docs/Features/README.md) for Wave specs\n4. Review [UX Documentation](../Docs/UX/README.md)\n5. Contribute design docs linked to issues\n6. Participate in design discussions\n\n### 📊 Stakeholder/Leadership\n1. Read [REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md) for overview\n2. Review [PRODUCTION_WAVES.md](./PRODUCTION_WAVES.md) for full strategy\n3. Check [Roadmap](../Docs/Roadmap/README.md) for timeline\n4. Monitor milestones for Wave progress\n5. Track velocity for release estimation\n\n### 🆕 New Team Member\n1. Read [Republic Manifesto](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/MANIFESTO.md) (2 min)\n2. Read [REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md) (10 min)\n3. Review [Design Principles](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/Design%20Principles.md) (10 min)\n4. Check current Wave in [Roadmap](../Docs/Roadmap/README.md)\n5. Follow [REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md) to set up your GitHub\n6. Pick an issue and start building!\n\n---\n\n## The North Star\n\n> **Republic is not a game about ruling people.**\n>\n> **It is a game about carrying the burden of democratic leadership.**\n\nThis truth guides every decision in Republic Studio.\n\n**For every feature, ask:**\n- \"Does this make the player feel the burden, responsibility, and complexity of leadership?\"\n- \"Does this answer 'yes' to most questions in the [Republic Test](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/Design%20Principles.md#the-republic-test)?\"\n\nIf no → Redesign or omit.\n\n---\n\n## Production Waves at a Glance\n\n```\nWAVE 0: Foundation\n  Nothing visible. Only architecture.\n  → \"The skeleton works\"\n  → 2-3 weeks\n\nWAVE 1: Simulation Core\n  The world lives without a player.\n  → \"The world lives without a player\"\n  → 3-4 weeks\n\nWAVE 2: Decision Interface\n  The player has an office.\n  → \"The player has an office\"\n  → 4-6 weeks\n\nWAVE 3: Emergence & Depth\n  Every choice matters and echoes.\n  → \"Every choice matters and echoes\"\n  → 6-8 weeks\n\nWAVE 4: Intelligence & Autonomy\n  The world doesn't need you to survive.\n  → \"The world doesn't need you to survive\"\n  → 4-6 weeks\n\nWAVE 5: Multiplayer & Emergence\n  Politics becomes personal.\n  → \"Politics becomes personal\"\n  → 4-6 weeks\n\nWAVE 6: Presentation & Polish\n  The world looks like leadership.\n  → \"The world looks like leadership\"\n  → 4-6 weeks\n\nTOTAL: ~39 weeks to release\n```\n\n---\n\n## GitHub at a Glance\n\n### Issues\n- Every task is an issue\n- Tagged with Wave label (Wave-0-Foundation, etc)\n- Assigned to Wave milestone\n- Linked to design docs\n- Added to project board\n\n### Project Boards (8)\n- Wave 0 - Foundation\n- Wave 1 - Simulation Core\n- Wave 2 - Decision Interface\n- Wave 3 - Emergence & Depth\n- Wave 4 - Intelligence & Autonomy\n- Wave 5 - Multiplayer & Emergence\n- Wave 6 - Presentation & Polish\n- Active Sprint (master board)\n\nEach with columns: Backlog → Not Started → In Progress → In Review → Done\n\n### Milestones (7)\nOne per Wave. Represents completion gate.\n\n### Labels\n- Wave labels (Wave-0-Foundation, etc)\n- Priority (Critical, High, Medium, Low)\n- Type (epic, feature, bug, chore, docs)\n- Status (blocked, in-progress, ready-review, done)\n\n### Discussions\n- Design debates\n- Feature proposals\n- Questions\n- Announcements\n- Retrospectives\n\n---\n\n## Workflow Overview\n\n### Daily\n1. Check Active Sprint board\n2. Pick issue from current Wave board\n3. Move to \"In Progress\"\n4. Build\n5. Create PR\n6. Move to \"In Review\"\n7. Merge\n8. Move to \"Done\"\n9. Repeat\n\n### Weekly\n1. Review Wave board backlog\n2. Move ready issues to \"Not Started\"\n3. Set Priority and Story Points\n4. Assign developers\n5. Commit to sprint\n6. Track velocity\n\n### Wave Completion\n1. All issues in \"Done\"\n2. Milestone achieved\n3. Celebrate 🎉\n4. Begin next Wave\n\n---\n\n## Success Metrics\n\n**Republic Studio is working when:**\n\n✅ Issues visible on appropriate Wave board\n✅ Issues moved across columns as work progresses\n✅ Developers update GitHub daily\n✅ Issues linked to design documentation\n✅ Velocity tracked week-to-week\n✅ Blockers identified and escalated\n✅ Wave milestones achieved on schedule\n✅ Team communicates via GitHub\n✅ Everything in one place (one source of truth)\n✅ Wave completion gates achieved\n✅ Momentum builds through all Waves\n✅ Release timeline on track\n\n---\n\n## Key Documents by Purpose\n\n### Understanding the Vision\n- [Republic Manifesto](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/MANIFESTO.md) - The north star\n- [Design Principles](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/Design%20Principles.md) - 16 core principles\n\n### Understanding the Strategy\n- [PRODUCTION_WAVES.md](./PRODUCTION_WAVES.md) - How we build\n- [Roadmap](../Docs/Roadmap/README.md) - Timeline and progress\n\n### Understanding What to Build\n- [Features](../Docs/Features/README.md) - Systems per Wave\n- [Architecture](../Docs/Architecture/README.md) - How to build systems\n\n### Understanding How to Work\n- [REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md) - GitHub setup\n- This README - Navigation and overview\n\n### Understanding the Experience\n- [UX Documentation](../Docs/UX/README.md) - Player interface\n- [Gameplay Philosophy](../Docs/Gameplay%20Philosophy/README.md) - Design vision\n\n---\n\n## Getting Started\n\n### For First Time Setup\n1. ✅ Read [REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO.md)\n2. ✅ Read [PRODUCTION_WAVES.md](./PRODUCTION_WAVES.md)\n3. ✅ Follow [REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md)\n4. ✅ Create Wave project boards\n5. ✅ Create milestones\n6. ✅ Create labels\n7. ✅ Link existing issues\n8. ✅ Start first sprint\n\n### For Daily Development\n1. ✅ Check [REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md](./REPUBLIC_STUDIO_SETUP.md) workflow section\n2. ✅ Open current Wave project board\n3. ✅ Pick issue\n4. ✅ Build\n5. ✅ Create PR\n6. ✅ Move to Done\n7. ✅ Repeat\n\n### For Project Management\n1. ✅ Monitor [Roadmap](../Docs/Roadmap/README.md) for Wave progress\n2. ✅ Track milestones for completion gates\n3. ✅ Review velocity trends\n4. ✅ Identify blockers\n5. ✅ Plan next Wave\n\n---\n\n## GitHub Links\n\n- **[Repository](https://github.com/Don-Walesky/Republic-Game)** - Main repo\n- **[Issues](https://github.com/Don-Walesky/Republic-Game/issues)** - All tasks\n- **[Projects](https://github.com/Don-Walesky/Republic-Game/projects)** - Wave boards\n- **[Milestones](https://github.com/Don-Walesky/Republic-Game/milestones)** - Wave gates\n- **[Discussions](https://github.com/Don-Walesky/Republic-Game/discussions)** - Design & feedback\n- **[Actions](https://github.com/Don-Walesky/Republic-Game/actions)** - CI/CD\n\n---\n\n## Philosophy\n\n### One Source of Truth\nEverything lives in GitHub. No scattered tools. No hidden information. One studio.\n\n### Clear Progression\nEach Wave builds on previous. No skipping. No shortcuts. Complete each Wave before next.\n\n### Visible Progress\nEveryone can see status, blockers, and timeline. No surprises. Transparent progress.\n\n### Connected Work\nEvery issue linked to design. Every task tracked. No orphaned work. All documented.\n\n---\n\n## The Journey\n\n```\nWave 0: Foundation         ← You are here\n   ↓\nWave 1: Simulation Core\n   ↓\nWave 2: Decision Interface\n   ↓\nWave 3: Emergence & Depth\n   ↓\nWave 4: Intelligence & Autonomy\n   ↓\nWave 5: Multiplayer & Emergence\n   ↓\nWave 6: Presentation & Polish\n   ↓\n🎉 RELEASE\n```\n\n**~39 weeks from now.**\n\n---\n\n*Republic is built in Production Waves. GitHub is the studio. This is how we ship.*\n"
